channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government continues suspension of TV news TRP ratings amid West Asia conflict concerns
item.description: The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting (MIB) has once again extended the suspension of television rating points (TRPs) for news channels, directing the Broadcast Audience Research Council (BARC)...

item.title: Influencer Rogan O’Handley declines involvement in Trump UFO files release
item.description: Rogan O’Handley, a MAGA-aligned social media personality known as DC Draino, has announced that he will not participate in the release of forthcoming 'UFO Files'. O’Handley expressed regret over his e...

item.title: Crew Members Medically Evacuated from Cruise Ship After Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak
item.description: Three people, including two crew members, were medically evacuated from the MV Hondius after a suspected hantavirus outbreak that may have resulted in at least three passenger deaths. The cruise ship,...

item.title: B.C. Government Spends Nearly $300,000 on Charter Flights for Court Transportation in Remote Areas
item.description: Over the past five months, British Columbia taxpayers have spent close to $300,000 to transport inmates via private planes between rural and remote courthouses and detention centres. Since December 20...

item.title: Pakistan commemorates first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq, honours Air Force role
item.description: Pakistan is marking the first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq by recognising the pivotal role of the Pakistan Air Force (PAF) in defending the country. The Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR) described ...

item.title: Three Foreign Nationals Sentenced for Trafficking in Pampanga Scam Operation
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – The Angeles City Regional Trial Court Branch 114 has convicted three foreign nationals involved in a trafficking operation linked to a scam hub in Pampanga. The court, led by Jud...

item.title: Suspect Fires at Secret Service Agents Near White House, Bystander Injured
item.description: On May 6, 2026, Michael Marx, 45, from Texas, was involved in a shooting incident near the White House, shortly after Vice President JD Vance's motorcade passed through the area. Surveillance cameras ...

item.title: Nairobi Man Criticises Police in Viral Video, Public Urged to Respect Officers
item.description: A video that has been going viral online shows a Nairobi man verbally attacking police officers, mocking their salaries and living conditions. The man, identified as Jared Okoth, also known as General...

item.title: Trump optimistic on quick resolution as US and Iran discuss peace proposal
item.description: US President Donald Trump expressed optimism on May 6, 2026, that the war with Iran could end soon, citing efforts to prevent Tehran from acquiring a nuclear weapon. Trump made the statement during a ...

item.title: David Attenborough Celebrates 100 Years of Life and Work in Nature
item.description: David Attenborough, di legendary naturalist wey don waka di world and educate people about wildlife, don celebrate him 100th birthday. From small pikin, him don get passion for nature, study geology a...

item.title: Bafana Bafana Supporter Wins World Cup Travel Prize for Years of Dedication
item.description: Mamello Makha, a passionate supporter of South African football, has been chosen as one of sixteen fans to receive an all-expenses-paid trip to the upcoming FIFA World Cup, which will take place acros...

item.title: How Malayalam Subtitles Helped Bring World Cinema to Local Audiences
item.description: During the late 1990s and early 2000s, film societies in Kerala experienced a decline due to dwindling memberships and the rise of satellite television. However, the mid-2000s saw a revival sparked by...

item.title: NTSA sets KSh 3,050 standard fee for Smart driving licence renewal in Kenya
item.description: The article explains the updated NTSA driving licence renewal process and fees in Kenya following the full rollout of the Smart Driving Licence (Smart DL). Currently, all motorists are required to ren...

item.title: Fiancé of Ashlee Jenae Shares Grief and Tribute After Her Sudden Death in Zanzibar
item.description: Social media influencer Ashly Robinson, popularly known as Ashlee Jenae, tragically passed away on April 9 while on vacation in Zanzibar with her fiancé, Joe McCan. The couple had gone to the coastal ...

item.title: Fertiliser shortages linked to Iran conflict could drive up global food prices next year
item.description: Fertiliser shortages caused by the ongoing conflict involving Iran are expected to significantly impact global food prices, warns Mark Preston, executive trustee of the historic Grosvenor Group. UK fa...

item.title: Supreme Court questions time spent on religion-related disputes amid heavy caseload
item.description: NEW DELHI: The Supreme Court of India, in a significant hearing on Wednesday, raised concerns about the extensive time devoted to religious disputes given its massive backlog of cases. A nine-judge be...

item.title: Napo County Gains Recognition for Its Rich Birdlife and Conservation Efforts
item.description: Napo County, located on the China-Vietnam border in the southwest of Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region, has become a hotspot for birdwatchers. On 26 March, the county hosted its first bird-watching com...

item.title: Fire in Taguig Displaces 11 Families, Homes Destroyed
item.description: A fire broke out in Taguig City early on May 7, 2026, leaving 11 families homeless. Local authorities reported that the blaze quickly spread through a residential area, destroying multiple houses. For...

item.title: Eight-Year-Old Boy Bitten by Rabid Beaver at New Jersey Lake
item.description: An eight-year-old boy was bitten by a rabid beaver while fishing with his family at Lake Henry in Continental Soldiers Park, Mahwah, New Jersey. The incident occurred on Sunday evening, shortly before...

item.title: Updated Ballon d’Or 2026 Rankings After Champions League Exits
item.description: The 2026 Ballon d’Or race is heating up, especially after Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain made it to the Champions League final. Arsenal reached their first final in 20 years by defeating Atletico Mad...
